chemistry.reaction_name: Photoredox Iridium-Nickel Dual-Catalyzed Decarboxylative Arylation Cross-Coupling
chemistry.scope_summary: Various aryl halides including 4′-chloroacetophenone, 5-acetyl-2-bromopyridine, 1-bromo-4-ethylbenzene, and 4-ethyl-1-iodobenzene were tested, with electron-deficient aryl halides showing better reactivity

optimization_table.key_findings: tBu-TMG base at 50°C with 12 min residence time gave optimal productivity of 710 mg/h

figures.caption: Figure 1.  Proposed mechanism of Ir − Ni-catalyzed C(sp 3 ) − C(sp 2 ) photoredox cross-coupling. 15

components: Water-cooling base with electrical cartridge heaters
figures.flow_path: Reagents → Liquid Handler → Syringe 1 → OFR → Syringe 5 (Quench) → HPLC
figures.key_information: Operation range: 20-70°C, LED wavelength: 405 nm, Argon pressure: 100 psig, wash solution and online injection capabilities
figures.caption: Figure 2.  (a) Overview of the segmented flow reactor. Adapted with permission from ref 32a . Copyright 2017 The Royal Society of Chemistry. (b) Photochemistry module to accommodate the OFR (designed by Novartis). | Figure 3.  Work flow: (1) validation; (2) screening and optimization; (3) production and scale-up.
Figure 4.  Use of the oscillatory segmented flow reactor to obtain reaction profiles: (a) organic base screening; (b) temperature screening with tBu-TMG; (c) temperature screening with DBU.

translation_logic.batch_limitation: Batch conditions required 30°C with Blue LEDs but yield was limited to 81%
translation_logic.flow_advantage: Flow conditions enabled higher temperature (50°C) with improved heat transfer, achieving 88% yield with 12 min residence time and predictable scale-up to hundreds of mg/h
translation_logic.what_changed: Temperature increased from 30°C to 50°C, residence time reduced to 12 min, throughput increased to 35.4 mmol/h
translation_logic.what_stayed_same: Same catalyst system (2 mol% Ir photocatalyst, 10 mol% Ni co-catalyst), same solvent (DMF), same concentration (0.05 M), same base (tBu-TMG)
translation_logic.safety_improvement: Flow conditions enable better temperature control and heat transfer with continuous processing

figure_descriptions: Mechanistic scheme showing dual Ir/Ni photoredox catalysis cycle
Detailed reactor scheme with oscillatory flow reactor setup
Optimization plots showing base screening and temperature effects
Scope table with various aryl halide substrates

conflicts: Light wavelength: text mentions 440 nm but figure shows 405 nm LED - using text value as primary
notes: Comprehensive extraction with good coverage of chemistry, reactor setup, and optimization data. Minor wavelength discrepancy noted between text and figure. Flow optimization clearly demonstrated advantages over batch conditions.
